subject: Bump SO version to 1.6.0
commit_message:
Bump SO version to 1.6.0

Issue-ID: SO-2519
Signed-off-by: seshukm <seshu.kumar.m@huawei.com>
Change-Id: Ib340900d834f1b74b1ca936dc5c2de96d3c6ad96
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2

pods and HC seems OK, I would prefer a GO from our Integration experts 😊

Patch Set 2:

hmm the results displayed and the link is a bit suspicious...
If I look at 
https://gating-results.onap.eu/results/104584-2/infrastructure-healthcheck/k8s/index.html
results are not as good...
job onap-netbox-app-provisioning as well as it associated deployment failed (do not see the link)

Healthcheck:
- timeout on vid test (seems to be OK before)
- nbi (lnown issue)
healthdist + pôstinstalls till OK

SO healthcheck OK but...no update of so update seen so new features probably not covered by new tests.

SO rooted pods fixed: https://gating-results.onap.eu/results/104584-2/security/root_pods/root_pods.log
no more so public http port

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2

errors not linked to SO
and SO issues seem to be fixed
troubleshooting needed on E2E tests but better to do it on the target SO
